design_philosophy.core_concept: Frictionless, dense, keyboard-friendly interface. High contrast text on dark navy backgrounds. Subtle borders over heavy shadows.

rules: Overlines/Labels MUST be uppercase with tracking-wide (0.05em).
Body text should never be pure white (#FFFFFF). Use Slate-200 or Slate-300 for readability without eye strain.

layout_strategy.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
layout_strategy.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px) for cards, rounded-md (6px) for buttons. Avoid fully rounded corners unless pill-buttons.

grids.candidate_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 (Bento Grid: Hero 8 cols, Side 4 cols)

component_overrides.Button: h-9 px-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-indigo-500/20
component_overrides.Card: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 shadow-sm hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors
component_overrides.Input: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 h-10 rounded-md
component_overrides.Badge: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border border-transparent

universal_guidelines: LANGUAGE: ALL USER FACING TEXT MUST BE IN FRENCH (fr-FR).
NO DEFAULT GRADIENTS: Use solid dark colors with subtle 1px borders for depth.
INTERACTIVITY: Every clickable element must have a hover state (brightness-110 or bg-slate-800).
DATA DENSITY: For Recruiter views, prioritize density (small text, tight rows). For Candidate views, prioritize focus (cards, whitespace).
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text-slate-400 is not used on dark backgrounds for essential text; use text-slate-300 minimum.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all inputs, buttons, and cards.
instructions_to_main_agent: Setup 'dark' class in tailwind config as default.
For the Kanban board, use 'dnd-kit' or simply a grid layout if drag-drop is too complex for MVP.
Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) logic in the frontend layout wrapper.
